name: Azure Sentinel Detection Engineering Coverage
description: Coverage of the deployed detections (5 AzureActivity control-plane + 1 Defender for Endpoint), with honest gaps in the same tactics. Green = covered by a deployed rule; red = known gap.

techniques.comment: DET-001 Failed Activity Log operations spike (heuristic, failed-permission probing)
DET-002 Network Security Group rule modified
DET-006 LSASS credential access (Defender for Endpoint DeviceEvents)
GAP, Valid Accounts: no sign-in / impossible-travel anomaly detection yet
GAP, Brute Force: no auth-failure correlation on sign-ins
GAP, Cloud Service Discovery: only partially implied by DET-001
GAP, Data from Cloud Storage: no storage data-plane access detection
GAP, Resource Hijacking: no crypto-mining / spend-anomaly detection

metadata.name: rules
metadata.value: 6 scheduled analytics rules (5 AzureActivity + 1 Defender for Endpoint)
